title: tricalysia anomala var. montana
intro: Tricalysia anomala var. montana, also known as a variant of the Tricalysia anomala plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, Tricalysia anomala var. montana has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Tricalysia anomala var. montana typically involve boiling the leaves in water or mixing them with other herbs to create teas or infusions for medicinal use.
